name: spectral-skills
description: Claude-compatible and Codex-compatible spectral workflow bundles for reading raw spectral files, QC, splitting, preprocessing, feature extraction, modeling, optimizer searches, publication figures, and end-to-end workflow routing. Skills include spectral-reader, spectral-qc, spectral-splitter, spectral-preprocess, spectral-feature, spectral-modeling, spectral-optimizer, spectral-report, and spectral-workflow.
